flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at California State University-Monterey Bay rose 50% between 2006 and 2009 ($3.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Monterey Bay fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at California State University-Monterey Bay rose 23% between 2006 and 2009 (3.4k → 4.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Monterey Bay rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (32.5% → 39.2%).
